cyber_timeline.anomaly_description: Delayed command response detected at the control/communications layer.

explanation.expected_vs_observed_summary: Command applied at s=190239. pcc_p_kw increased from mean 80.07 kW to max 87.34 kW and bess_p_kw shifted from charging to discharging at the same time.
explanation.timing_summary: command_apply_time_s (190239) = physical_effect_start_time_s (190239). Cyber event coincides with physical change.
explanation.operator_summary: Coordinated dispatch command coincided with concurrent PV and BESS changes. Verify whether this was authorized.
recommended_operator_checks: Check pv_001 and bess_001 setpoint logs
explanation.human_explanation: A command was applied and physical signals changed simultaneously. This is consistent with a cyber-driven physical change.
